raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute against merchant XXXX for billing me in the amount of {$39.00} from XX/XX/XXXX through XX/XX/XXXX without my consent or knowledge. I have been refunded for the monthly charges from XX/XX/XXXX through XX/XX/XXXX. However, Im still pending refunds for the monthly charges from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. I have reached out to the merchant directly which declines to offer me any information or proof that I signed up for their monthly service, hence why I disputed it with Citibank, the company I have my credit card with that was billed for these transactions. I filed this dispute in XXXX XXXX XXXX. I had called in XXXX and XXXX of XXXX and was told it would take an additional XXXX billing cycles to resolve. I called Citibank back today, XX/XX/XXXX, to follow up on the status and was once again told it would take XXXX billing cycles from today 's date. Im writing this complaint since it is now XXXX months since I filed this dispute and Citibank does not appear to be making any progress.
